what_works: Homepage title and H1 directly match مشاوره رایگان کنکور intent
Homepage returns 200 and has one H1
Phone and Didar form CTAs are present
Homepage mentions Dr. Zahra Jafari, Isfahan, Tehran, and branch schema signals
/about/ and /contact-us/ are live trust/contact support pages

findings.title: Homepage needs stronger proof before the lead form
findings.description: The free consultation promise is clear, but users still need clearer proof, process explanation, advisor role, outcomes, and expectation-setting before submitting a lead.
findings.recommendation: Add near-CTA sections for what happens next, what the free consultation includes, advisor credentials, student outcomes, testimonials, and FAQ objections.

findings.title: Main consultation hub does not support the broader journey
findings.description: /مشاوره-کنکور/ returns 200 but the live probe found 17 H1 elements and article/listing behavior, so it cannot fully carry commercial comparison and service-depth intent.
findings.recommendation: Rebuild /مشاوره-کنکور/ as a true commercial hub with one H1, proof, FAQs, packages/pricing paths, and links to child landings.

findings.title: CTA journey has broken or mismatched next pages
findings.description: /مشاوره-آنلاین-کنکور/, /اصفهان/, and /تهران/ return 404, while /ثبت-نام/, /برنامه-ریزی-کنکور/, and /انتخاب-رشته/ redirect to mismatched articles.
findings.recommendation: Fix the post-homepage journey with live intent-matched pages for online consultation, registration, planning, selection, Isfahan, and Tehran.

findings.title: Persona segmentation is still thin
findings.description: The page addresses the general consultation need but does not clearly separate parent, student, online, Isfahan, Tehran, and high-intent buyer motivations.
findings.recommendation: Add short persona blocks with specific benefits, proof, and CTAs for each major audience segment.
